responses.response:
{
  "summary": "Analysis of query bottleneck: Slow correlated subquery for avg order value",
  "candidateProposals": [
    {
      "proposalId": "idx_orders_user_created",
      "strategyType": "index",
      "applySQL": "CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_created ON orders(user_id, created_at);",
      "rollbackSQL": "DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_orders_user_created;",
      "deploySQL": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_user_created ON orders(user_id, created_at);",
      "targetQuery": null,
      "notes": "Covers the WHERE + ORDER BY pattern, reducing full table scan on orders",
      "expectedImpact": "high"
    },
    {
      "proposalId": "orders_status_idx",
      "strategyType": "index",
      "applySQL": "CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status ON orders(status);",
      "rollbackSQL": "DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_orders_status;",
      "deploySQL": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_status ON orders(status);",
      "targetQuery": null,
      "notes": "Improves performance for filtering completed orders, reducing correlation with avg_order_value_cents subquery"
    },
    {
      "proposalId": "orders_created_at_idx",
      "strategyType": "index",
      "applySQL": "CREATE INDEX idx_orders_created_at ON orders(created_at);",
      "rollbackSQL": "DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_orders_created_at;",
      "deploySQL": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_created_at ON orders(created_at);",
      "targetQuery": null,
      "notes": "Reduces full table scan for filtering orders within the last 90 days"
    },
    {
      "proposalId": "orders_status_and_created_at_idx",
      "strategyType": "index",
      "applySQL": "CREATE INDEX idx_orders_status_and_created_at ON orders(status, created_at);",
      "rollbackSQL": "DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_orders_status_and_created_at;",
      "deploySQL": "CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY idx_orders_status_and_created_at ON orders(status, created_at);",
      "targetQuery": null,
      "notes": "Combines the benefits of filtering on status and date, further reducing subquery's impact"
    }
  ]
}
